headlines.summary_cn: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

items.title_cn: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
items.title_en: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
items.summary_cn: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.
items.summary_en: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

items.title_cn: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
items.title_en: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
items.summary_cn: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.
items.summary_en: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

items.title_cn: Show HN: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
items.title_en: Show HN: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
items.summary_cn:
Data visualizations are the bridge between user and data.

But building AI agents that can generate visualizations reliably can be very tricky:

- simple chart specs can be reliable, but generated charts are often of low quality due to reliance on system defaults; - complex chart specs with explicit details can produce good-looking charts, but they are verbose and agents can struggle with reliability

We figured out it is a limitation on the language issue (not just AI capability thing) -- c
items.summary_en:

- simple chart specs can be reliable, but generated charts are often of low quality due to reliance on system defaults; - complex chart specs with explicit details can produce good-looking charts, but they are verbose and agents can struggle with reliability

We figured out it is a limitation on the language issue (not just AI capability thing) -- c

items.title_cn: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
items.title_en: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
items.summary_cn: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.
items.summary_en: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

items.title_cn: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.title_en: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
items.summary_cn: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a
items.summary_en: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time — an essential skill for producing intelligence that generalizes. That gap, it turns out, might be filled by gaming data. That’s the bet behind General Intuition, a

items.title_cn: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
items.title_en: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
items.summary_cn: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.
items.summary_en: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.
